questions.question: Describe the primary function of a device driver in an operating system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of a device driver

questions.question: What is the difference between a process and a thread in an operating system? Provide an example to illustrate your answer. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Outline the key differences and provide a relevant example

questions.question: An operating system is installed on a computer's hard disk. What happens to the data on the hard disk when the operating system is installed? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the process of data overwrite or replacement
